name: Kochi

seo.description: Compare 470+ verified packers and movers in Kochi. Instant quotes starting ₹5,000. Edapally, Kakkanad, Aluva, Marine Drive covered. Live GPS tracking.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Kochi
hero.subtitle: Kakkanad to Edapally, Aluva to Marine Drive — 470+ verified movers in Kerala's commercial capital.

intro: Kochi is Kerala's commercial and IT hub, with a unique island-and-mainland geography spanning Fort Kochi, Mattancherry, Ernakulam Mainland, and Kakkanad. ShiftIndia's 470+ verified vendors navigate all of this with ease.
whyUs: Kochi's backwater geography means some localities require waterway logistics. Our specialist vendors cover both road and water access routes for full-city coverage.

faqs.q: Do you cover Fort Kochi and Mattancherry?
faqs.a: Yes — including island localities accessed by road bridges and ferry routes.

faqs.q: What does a 2 BHK move cost in Kochi?
faqs.a: ₹8,000 – ₹15,000 depending on locality, floor, and packing requirements.

faqs.q: Do you move to Bangalore and Coimbatore?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves from Kochi are available with GPS tracking and ₹5L protection.
